component.name: streamrs
component.summary: Stream Deck daemon and GUI configurator in Rust

description.p: streamrs is a lightweight Linux-first toolkit for configuring Stream Deck keys, icons, and actions with a native GTK 4 and libadwaita interface.

It includes a background daemon, a graphical profile editor, live preview tooling, bundled starter icons, and support for regular launcher buttons, status-driven icon toggles, clock buttons, and calendar buttons.

screenshot.caption: streamrs profile editor with live Stream Deck preview
